community betterment devel

Establishes the Western Australian Planning Commission (WAPC) and provides
for an efficient and effective land use planning system which promotes the
sustainable use and development of land in the State.

Provide for the comprehensive planning of regions, sub-regions or particular locations to guide
change and a basis for cooperative action to be taken by State and local government on land
use and development.
Provide detailed guidance on the application of WAPC policies.
